requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容符合性——SM / ATIC（EN协调标准）
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容符合性——SM / ATIC（EN協調標準）

summary.en: Moldova applies SM (Standard Moldovean) standards that mirror EN/ETSI harmonised standards for EMC. Wireless and IoT devices must demonstrate EMC conformity under SM EN 301 489 series (radio EMC) and SM EN 55032 / SM EN 55035 (multimedia equipment EMC emissions and immunity). EMC compliance is evidenced through the DS (Declaration of Conformity) and accompanying technical file. ATIC (Agency for Technical Supervision and Metrology) oversees conformity under Law 235/2011.
summary.zh: 摩尔多瓦采用与EN/ETSI协调标准对应的SM（摩尔多瓦国家标准）进行电磁兼容管理。无线及物联网设备须依据SM EN 301 489系列（无线电设备电磁兼容）以及SM EN 55032/SM EN 55035（多媒体设备电磁兼容辐射及抗扰度）证明电磁兼容符合性。符合性通过DS（符合性声明）及附属技术文件予以证明。ATIC（技术监督与计量局）依据《第235/2011号法》负责监管符合性。
summary.zht: 摩爾多瓦採用與EN/ETSI協調標準對應的SM（摩爾多瓦國家標準）進行電磁相容管理。無線及物聯網裝置須依據SM EN 301 489系列（無線電設備電磁相容）以及SM EN 55032/SM EN 55035（多媒體設備電磁相容輻射及抗擾度）證明電磁相容符合性。符合性通過DS（符合性聲明）及附屬技術文件予以證明。ATIC（技術監督與計量局）依據《第235/2011號法》負責監管符合性。

standards_or_laws: SM EN 301 489-1 (common EMC requirements for radio equipment)
SM EN 301 489-17 (specific conditions for wideband data transmission — Wi-Fi/BT)
SM EN 55032 (multimedia equipment — emissions, mirrors CISPR 32)
SM EN 55035 (multimedia equipment — immunity, mirrors CISPR 35)
Law 235/2011 on technical regulations (Republic of Moldova)

summary.en: China requires CCC certification for EMC under GB standards (GB/T 9254.1 for emissions, GB/T 17618 for immunity). For radio devices, SRRC type approval covers radio interference aspects. GB standards for EMC differ structurally from EN/ETSI-mirrored SM standards, and CCC EMC test reports cannot be directly substituted for SM/EN-based EMC evidence in Moldova.
summary.zh: 中国要求按GB标准取得CCC认证中的电磁兼容部分（GB/T 9254.1辐射发射，GB/T 17618抗扰度）。对于无线设备，SRRC型式核准涵盖无线电干扰方面。GB电磁兼容标准与EN/ETSI镜像SM标准在结构上存在差异，CCC电磁兼容测试报告不能直接替代摩尔多瓦SM/EN为基础的电磁兼容证明。
summary.zht: 中國要求按GB標準取得CCC認證中的電磁相容部分（GB/T 9254.1輻射發射，GB/T 17618抗擾度）。對於無線裝置，SRRC型式核准涵蓋無線電干擾方面。GB電磁相容標準與EN/ETSI鏡像SM標準在結構上存在差異，CCC電磁相容測試報告不能直接替代摩爾多瓦SM/EN為基礎的電磁相容證明。

gap.en: CCC EMC test reports (based on GB standards) are not directly recognised in Moldova. SM standards mirror EN/ETSI, so EN-based EMC test reports from accredited EU or internationally recognised laboratories may be accepted as technical file evidence, potentially reducing retesting costs. However, a Moldovan DS covering EMC is still mandatory. ATIC market surveillance may request documentary evidence of SM-standard conformity.
gap.zh: CCC电磁兼容测试报告（基于GB标准）在摩尔多瓦不被直接认可。SM标准与EN/ETSI对应，欧盟认可或国际认可实验室出具的EN为基础的电磁兼容测试报告可作为技术文件证明，有助于降低重新测试成本。但涵盖电磁兼容的摩尔多瓦DS仍属强制要求。ATIC市场监督可能要求提供SM标准符合性文件证明。
gap.zht: CCC電磁相容測試報告（基於GB標準）在摩爾多瓦不被直接認可。SM標準與EN/ETSI對應，歐盟認可或國際認可實驗室出具的EN為基礎的電磁相容測試報告可作為技術文件證明，有助於降低重新測試成本。但涵蓋電磁相容的摩爾多瓦DS仍屬強制要求。ATIC市場監督可能要求提供SM標準符合性文件證明。

source.publisher: ATIC (Agency for Technical Supervision and Metrology, Republic of Moldova)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese CCC EMC test reports based on GB standards cannot directly substitute for SM/EN-based EMC evidence in Moldova. EN-based test reports from accredited labs may support the Moldovan DS technical file, but a separate Moldovan conformity declaration is mandatory. Engage a Moldovan conformity body or authorised representative to confirm SM-standard equivalence before relying on existing EN reports.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 基于GB标准的中国CCC电磁兼容测试报告不能直接替代摩尔多瓦SM/EN为基础的电磁兼容证明。认可实验室出具的EN为基础测试报告可支持摩尔多瓦DS技术文件，但仍须单独出具摩尔多瓦符合性声明。在依赖现有EN报告前，请与摩尔多瓦符合性机构或授权代表确认SM标准等效性。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 基於GB標準的中國CCC電磁相容測試報告不能直接替代摩爾多瓦SM/EN為基礎的電磁相容證明。認可實驗室出具的EN為基礎測試報告可支持摩爾多瓦DS技術文件，但仍須單獨出具摩爾多瓦符合性聲明。在依賴現有EN報告前，請與摩爾多瓦符合性機構或授權代表確認SM標準等效性。

requirement_topic.en: ATIC Market Surveillance and DS Filing

summary.en: ATIC (Agency for Technical Supervision and Metrology) is the Moldovan market surveillance authority under Law 235/2011. Importers or authorised representatives must maintain a DS (Declaration of Conformity) and a complete technical file in Moldovan or Russian language, available for ATIC inspection. The DS must reference the applicable SM standards and be signed by the responsible economic operator in Moldova. ATIC can order product withdrawal for non-conforming devices.
summary.zh: ATIC（技术监督与计量局）是《第235/2011号法》下的摩尔多瓦市场监督机构。进口商或授权代表须以摩尔多瓦语或俄语保存DS（符合性声明）及完整技术文件，以备ATIC检查。DS须引用适用SM标准，并由摩尔多瓦境内的责任经营主体签署。ATIC可对不合规设备下令撤市。
summary.zht: ATIC（技術監督與計量局）是《第235/2011號法》下的摩爾多瓦市場監督機構。進口商或授權代表須以摩爾多瓦語或俄語保存DS（符合性聲明）及完整技術文件，以備ATIC檢查。DS須引用適用SM標準，並由摩爾多瓦境內的責任經營主體簽署。ATIC可對不合規裝置下令撤市。

standards_or_laws: Law 235/2011 on technical regulations (Republic of Moldova)
Law 7/2016 on market surveillance (Republic of Moldova)
ATIC — Agenția pentru Supraveghere Tehnică (market surveillance mandate)

summary.en: In China, market surveillance is conducted by SAMR (State Administration for Market Regulation). CCC certificates must be maintained by the certificate holder and are subject to annual factory inspections by CCC certification bodies. Technical documentation is maintained in Chinese and must be available for SAMR inspection. No direct equivalent to the Moldovan DS filing system.
summary.zh: 在中国，市场监督由SAMR（国家市场监督管理总局）负责。CCC证书须由证书持有人保存，并接受CCC认证机构的年度工厂检查。技术文件以中文保存，须供SAMR检查。无直接对应摩尔多瓦DS申报制度的机制。
summary.zht: 在中國，市場監督由SAMR（國家市場監督管理總局）負責。CCC證書須由證書持有人保存，並接受CCC認證機構的年度工廠檢查。技術文件以中文保存，須供SAMR檢查。無直接對應摩爾多瓦DS申報制度的機制。

standards_or_laws: Product Quality Law of the People's Republic of China

gap.en: Moldova requires a Moldovan-language DS and technical file maintained by a local economic operator registered in Moldova, subject to ATIC inspection. Chinese CCC documentation and SAMR-facing records do not satisfy this obligation. A Moldovan importer or authorised representative must create and hold the DS and technical file independently of the Chinese manufacturer's CCC records.
gap.zh: 摩尔多瓦要求在摩尔多瓦注册的本地经营主体保存摩尔多瓦语DS及技术文件，并接受ATIC检查。中国CCC文件和面向SAMR的记录无法满足此义务。摩尔多瓦进口商或授权代表须独立于中国制造商CCC记录创建并持有DS及技术文件。
gap.zht: 摩爾多瓦要求在摩爾多瓦登記的本地經營主體保存摩爾多瓦語DS及技術文件，並接受ATIC檢查。中國CCC文件和面向SAMR的記錄無法滿足此義務。摩爾多瓦進口商或授權代表須獨立於中國製造商CCC記錄創建並持有DS及技術文件。

source.publisher: ATIC (Agency for Technical Supervision and Metrology, Republic of Moldova)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese CCC documentation does not satisfy Moldovan ATIC market surveillance requirements. A Moldovan DS and technical file in Moldovan or Russian must be created and maintained by a locally-registered economic operator. Failure to maintain these documents exposes the importer to ATIC enforcement action including product withdrawal.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国CCC文件不满足摩尔多瓦ATIC市场监督要求。须由在摩尔多瓦注册的经营主体创建并保存摩尔多瓦语或俄语DS及技术文件。未能保存上述文件将使进口商面临ATIC执法行动，包括产品撤市。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國CCC文件不符合摩爾多瓦ATIC市場監督要求。須由在摩爾多瓦登記的經營主體創建並保存摩爾多瓦語或俄語DS及技術文件。未能保存上述文件將使進口商面臨ATIC執法行動，包括產品撤市。
